task_completion.description: Create a role named 'RegionalManager' that extends the 'reader' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrientDB Studio Security tab showing 'RegionalManager' in the Roles list with 'reader' as its parent/inherited role, or a successful execution of a 'CREATE ROLE RegionalManager' SQL command.

task_completion.description: Create two users, 'manager_eu' and 'manager_na', assigned to the 'RegionalManager' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrientDB Studio Security tab showing 'manager_eu' and 'manager_na' in the Users list assigned to the 'RegionalManager' role, or successful 'CREATE USER' SQL commands for both users.

task_completion.description: Configure the '_allowRead' property on the 'Profiles' class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Schema/Class view in OrientDB Studio showing the '_allowRead' property added to the 'Profiles' class, or a successful execution of an 'ALTER CLASS' or 'CREATE PROPERTY' SQL command targeting 'Profiles._allowRead'.

task_completion.description: Restrict 'manager_eu' to only access profiles with European nationalities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an executed SQL UPDATE command in the Browse tab setting the '_allowRead' field for records where Nationality IN ['Italian', 'German', 'French', 'Spanish', 'Dutch', 'British', 'Greek'] to the 'manager_eu' user/role, or a SELECT query showing the '_allowRead' field correctly populated for these EU profiles.

task_completion.description: Restrict 'manager_na' to only access profiles with North American nationalities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an executed SQL UPDATE command in the Browse tab setting the '_allowRead' field for records where Nationality IN ['American', 'Canadian', 'Mexican', 'Brazilian'] to the 'manager_na' user/role, or a SELECT query showing the '_allowRead' field correctly populated for these NA profiles.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OrientDB Studio web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the browser address bar pointing to http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html and the OrientDB Studio UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually executed the commands or saved the GUI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success notifications, execution time metrics in the query results panel, or updated record counts confirming the database was actually modified.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply write the expected queries in a text editor without running them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The queries must be shown inside the OrientDB Studio query editor with corresponding result tables or success messages below them, not in a standalone text editor or terminal echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: 1) The EU nationalities to restrict are Italian, German, French, Spanish, Dutch, British, and Greek. 2) The manager password is 'management_access'. 3) The NA nationalities specified are American, Canadian, Mexican, and Brazilian. Note that the actual database only contains American and Mexican profiles, but the agent's query/policy should still include all four specified NA nationalities to fully satisfy the prompt.
